nasb.text: And some of those who were standing there, when they heard it, began saying, “This man is calling for Elijah.”

esv.text: And some of the bystanders, hearing it, said, “This man is calling Elijah.”

cnv.text: 有幾個站在那裡的人，聽見了就說：“這個人在呼叫以利亞呢。”

ccb.text: 有些站在旁边的人听见了，就说：“这人在呼叫以利亚呢。”

csbs.text: 站在那里的一些人听见了，就说：“这个人在呼唤以利亚呢！”
